rationale: The response correctly reframes SaaS growth as a multi-factor business outcome rather than attributing it solely to a good-looking login page. It explicitly names controlling factors such as customer fit, product value, channel quality, activation, retention, paid conversion, and sales efficiency, then provides bounded financing-language positioning for page design as a front-end conversion carrier. It avoids the fail signal of directly expanding 'pretty login page caused growth' into fundraising material.
